channel.title: Donce on Artem Yegorov
channel.description: Recent content in Donce on Artem Yegorov

item.title: Use Docker in Ruby with donce (docker once) gem
item.description: Do you work with Ruby and like Docker? I advise you to pay attention to donce gem. This is a simple but effective wrapper around the docker run command that allows you to run one-off containers of an image you specify. One of the main features is that you can run a container by passing the contents of the Dockerfile as a string. This is a very useful tool that allows you to run various tools in your tests or CI scripts without installing them as a dependency on your system.
